zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线弱势震荡偏空格局
zh.content:
当前以太坊/美元处于弱势震荡结构，价格持续运行于1580下方，短线多头动能不足，整体偏向整理回落格局。结构偏空延续短期承压

技术指标方面，价格已跌破20日均线1582，MACD柱值维持负值放大，空头动能占优，但尚未出现极端超卖信号。提示短期反弹受限注意风险

下方支撑关注1560一线与1550整数关口，上方阻力位于1580及1595附近，区间压制明显。需警惕突破方向选择波动加剧

操作上建议以反弹做空思路为主，等待回测1580附近再布局空单，同时严格设置止损防范假突破。控制仓位风险避免追单波段交易为宜观望

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is trading in a narrow consolidation band around 1566.8 USD, showing mild intraday weakness with a slight -0.12% daily change. The price remains below the 20-period SMA at 1582.46, indicating short-term bearish pressure. However, the limited volatility between 1562 and 1570 suggests market indecision rather than a strong trend. Overall structure reflects a sideways-to-bearish bias after recent rejection from higher levels.

Momentum indicators reinforce a weakening short-term outlook. MACD is negative at -3.19, suggesting bearish momentum persists, although the absence of a clear signal line reading limits confirmation of trend acceleration. RSI is unavailable, but price behavior near the lower intraday range implies neutral-to-oversold conditions. Buyers appear cautious, with limited conviction to reclaim the 1580 area, keeping upside momentum constrained in the short term.

Key support for ETH/USD is forming near 1560, with a deeper floor at 1545 where buyers previously emerged. Immediate resistance sits at 1570, followed by stronger supply at the 20-SMA around 1582. A breakout above 1582 could open the path toward 1600, while failure to hold 1560 increases risk of a move back toward recent lows in the near term.

Given the current range-bound structure, short-term traders may focus on mean reversion strategies between 1560 and 1570. Buying near support with tight stops below 1545 offers favorable risk-reward, while shorting into resistance near 1570–1582 remains viable for scalpers. A confirmed breakout above the 20-SMA would shift bias to bullish continuation, whereas sustained rejection keeps the market in consolidation mode.
